p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI: (1) test_repo_ruff_check - runs ruff check --config=pyproject.toml on model.py from .github/workflows/style.yaml, (2) test_repo_ruff_format - runs ruff format --check from .github/workflows/style.yaml, (3) test_repo_model_py_compiles - runs python3 -m py_compile. All 3 p2p tests pass on base commit c2dfc338. Also updated eval_manifest.yaml with corresponding checks.

validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile to add 'pip install ruff' for repo CI tests. All 4 functional tests pass: Docker build OK, NOP reward=0 (fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on buggy base), Gold reward=1 (all 12 tests pass after fix). Rubric judge returned ICR=0.5 due to LLM API authentication failure (infrastructure issue, not task quality issue).
